summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Hostel Music Queue system completed. All core features working correctly with minor Spotify playlist issue.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 error for hardcoded playlist ID '37i9dQZF1DX0XUsuxWHRQd'
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Spotify API returns 404 - Resource not found
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Update playlist IDs to valid ones or handle 404 gracefully

design_issues.issue: Console shows 404 errors when loading playlists tab

passed_tests: Admin login rejection with invalid password
Customer portal - page loading and navigation
Customer portal - search functionality with results display
Customer portal - add songs to queue with toast notifications
Customer portal - queue view with real-time updates
Admin dashboard - stats display (Now Playing, In Queue, Total Songs)
Admin dashboard - currently playing song display
Admin dashboard - skip and clear queue buttons accessibility
Real-time updates between customer and admin views
action_item_for_main_agent: Update hardcoded Spotify playlist IDs in /app/backend/server.py (lines 131-147) to use valid playlist IDs or add error handling for invalid playlists
